metadata.title: Our Eyes Slowly Burn, But There Is Nothing Left To See
metadata.artist: And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun
tracklist: 01 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - All We Have Are The Fragments Of Our Memory
02 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - There Is No Forfeit; No Absolution
03 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Cannot Be Buried
04 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - We Have Yet To Reach The Peak Of Declination
05 And We Walk Endlessly Towards The Sun - What Can Be Remembered
